title: Design System: IDX Stock Analysis & Screening

display.purpose: Masthead, big report/stage headings, large rating figures. Fixed rem scale, never fluid.

title.purpose: Section headings inside a report. Sentence case only.

body.purpose: UI copy, labels, descriptions, buttons. Prose caps near 65ch.

label.purpose: Kickers, prices, dates, scores, tickers — always tabular-nums.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Inputs and inline panels. Barely-there grounding.

shadows.name: floating-menu
shadows.purpose: Autocomplete dropdowns, settings popover, filters panel.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Upload / confirm dialogs over a dimmed backdrop.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default entrance/transition easing — list items, dropdowns, stages.

motion.name: theme-200
motion.purpose: Body background/color crossfade when toggling light/dark.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one green action. Dark on-brand text, never white. Lifts on hover, settles on press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; min-height:44px; padding:10px 20px; border:none; border-radius:8px; background:var(--c-brand); color:var(--c-on-brand); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:var(--c-brand-deep); transform:translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--c-brand); outline-offset:2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity:0.45; cursor:not-allowed; }

components.name: Quiet Button
components.description: The secondary affordance — bordered, muted ink, transparent fill. Firms up on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-quiet { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; min-height:44px; padding:10px 20px; border:1px solid var(--c-line); border-radius:8px; background:transparent; color:var(--c-ink-muted); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-quiet:hover { border-color:var(--c-ink-muted); color:var(--c-ink); transform:translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-quiet:active { transform:translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-quiet:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--c-brand); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Verdict Pill
components.description: Tinted background + same-hue text. Tone is chosen by meaning (here: accumulation = up green).
components.css: .ds-pill { display:inline-block; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:9999px; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; } .ds-pill-pos { background:var(--c-pos-tint); color:var(--c-pos); } .ds-pill-neg { background:var(--c-neg-tint); color:var(--c-neg); } .ds-pill-warn { background:var(--c-warn-tint); color:var(--c-warn); } .ds-pill-info { background:var(--c-info-tint); color:var(--c-info); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Mono ticker field. Border shifts to green with a soft ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width:100%; padding:10px 14px; border:1px solid var(--c-line); border-radius:8px; background:var(--c-paper); color:var(--c-ink); font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.875rem; transition:border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; color:var(--c-ink-muted); } .ds-input:hover { border-color:var(--c-ink-muted); } .ds-input:focus { outline:none; border-color:var(--c-brand); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 20%, transparent); }

components.name: Nav Tab
components.description: Top tab. Active = ink over a 2px green underline; inactive = muted with a faint brand hover.
components.html: Stock ScreeningAI Status
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; gap:24px; } .ds-tab { padding-bottom:12px; border-bottom:2px solid transparent; color:var(--c-ink-muted); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; text-decoration:none; cursor:pointer; transition:color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-tab:hover { color:var(--c-ink); border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 20%, transparent); } .ds-tab-active { color:var(--c-ink); border-color:var(--c-brand); }

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: Segmented light/dark control from the settings popover. Active segment = green fill + on-brand text.
components.css: .ds-toggle { display:inline-flex; gap:4px; padding:4px; border:1px solid var(--c-line); border-radius:9999px; background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-well) 60%, transparent); } .ds-seg { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; min-height:36px; padding:0 12px; border:none; border-radius:9999px; background:transparent; color:var(--c-ink-muted); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-seg:hover { color:var(--c-ink); } .ds-seg-active { background:var(--c-brand); color:var(--c-on-brand); }

components.name: Dotted-Leader Row
components.description: The typographic spine: muted label · dotted leader · tabular value, optionally verdict-toned.
components.html: Stop lossRp 2,840
components.css: .ds-row { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:8px; padding:6px 0; } .ds-row-label { flex-shrink:0; color:var(--c-ink-muted); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; } .ds-row-leader { flex:1; min-width:16px; transform:translateY(-4px); border-bottom:1px dotted var(--c-line); } .ds-row-value { text-align:right; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; color:var(--c-ink); } .ds-row-neg { color:var(--c-neg); } .ds-row-pos { color:var(--c-pos); }

narrative.overview: A quiet research desk that happens to read the live order flow. It carries itself like a well-typeset equity-research note — serif masthead, dotted-leader rows, sentence-case headings, generous air around the numbers — but it is wired to the Indonesia Stock Exchange tape, so a single decisive green can light up when the flow says something. Typography and restraint do the reading-room work; one Stockbit green does the terminal work. The surface comes in two ambient settings: Day is a pure-white reading room, Night is a near-black trading floor, both carried by one token set the user flips from the gear in the top-right. Color is always a verdict, never decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Literate, authored feel — the page reads like research, not a feed.
One decisive green; all other color is semantic verdict only.
Numbers are the content: tabular figures, aligned columns, dotted-leader rows.
Dual theme (light reading room / dark trading floor) from one token set.
Screenshot-ready — any section cropped and shared stands alone legibly.

rules.name: The On-Brand Rule
rules.body: A green fill never carries white text. White-on-#13b87a fails contrast (2.6:1); white-on-#1ece85 fails worse (2.0:1). Green fills carry on-brand (#08130d) dark text. When green must be text, use brand-strong, never brand.

rules.name: The Verdict Rule
rules.body: Green, red, and amber appear only where they carry direction, rating, or risk. A gain or loss always also carries a +/− sign or word — color is never the sole signal.

rules.name: The Untinted Paper Rule
rules.body: The light ground is pure #ffffff, chroma 0. Warmth is forbidden in the paper; identity lives in the green, the type, and the data.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Headings are sentence case — never ALL CAPS. Short mono section labels are the one rationed exception.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: Any number in a column is mono with tabular-nums; scores and grades align to fixed-width columns so the eye scans straight down.

rules.name: The No-Card-Stack Rule
rules.body: Surfaces separate with hairlines and dotted leaders, not cards. Nested cards are forbidden everywhere.

rules.name: The Surface-Over-Shadow Rule
rules.body: In dark mode, elevation is a lighter surface (#1b2026) plus a brighter border — never a darker shadow.

dos: Do carry on-brand (#08130d) text on every green fill; reach for brand-strong when green must be text. Never white on green.
Do keep color a verdict — green/red/amber only where direction, rating, or risk is meant, always paired with a +/− sign or word.
Do set every figure in IBM Plex Mono with tabular-nums and align scores/grades to fixed-width columns.
Do separate sections with hairlines and dotted leaders; keep the single centered max-w-4xl column.
Do lift night-mode overlays onto the elevated surface (#1b2026) with a brighter hairline, not a darker shadow.
Do keep the light ground pure #ffffff and let the green, type, and data carry identity.
donts: Don't reproduce Bloomberg-terminal clutter — no wall-to-wall density, no ALL-CAPS shouting, no ten colors fighting for attention.
Don't drift into crypto-hype aesthetics — no neon glows, no gamified urgency, no gradient text.
Don't ship a generic indigo SaaS dashboard — the one accent is Stockbit green, never default Tailwind blue/indigo.
Don't stack or nest cards; don't tile the report into identical boxes.
Don't tint the paper warm or use a fluid clamp() display scale.
Don't rely on color alone, hover alone, or shadow alone to carry meaning.
